'''Pash Deven''' was a [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel]] [[Commander/Legends|commander]]. Deven was in charge of the failed [[Battle of Dennaskar|operation]] on [[Dennaskar]].<ref name="AJ4" />
